title: Book Type Enchanting
description: Type Books filter the Enchanting Table to only show applicable enchantments (Sword, Pickaxe, Armor, etc.)
body:
## 📚 BookTypeEnchanting: Lightweight, Class-Specific Enchantment Books

BookTypeEnchanting is a small, easy-to-install Minecraft mod that introduces **craftable, class-specific enchantment books** tied to particular tool and armor types. These books can only be applied to items of the corresponding class and are subject to configurable material tier restrictions.

***

## 🛠️ Main Features

*   **Class-Specific Books:** Adds unique enchantment books for:
    *   **Tools:** sword, axe, pickaxe, shovel, hoe, bow, crossbow, trident.
    *   **Armor:** helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots.
*   **Simple Crafting:** Books are created using a straightforward recipe.

***

## 🔨 Crafting Recipe

The crafting rule is simple and applies to all classes (exept trident, see below)

8x books + class item -> 8x Class Type Book

![Sword type book recipe](https://i.imgur.com/o5mkrft.png)

Triden type book has a different recipe to make it more easy to craft

![Pitchfor recipe](https://i.imgur.com/ZSW0cUC.png)

![Trident type book recipe](https://i.imgur.com/XdNAu6t.png)
***

## 🪄Usage

Just place it in the Enchanting table add some lapis and choose the enchanting you want (it will only show enchanting for the specific type of weapon/tool/armor the book is for) and it becomes a normal enchanted book you can apply normally in the anvil.

***

## 💾 Installation

1.  Place the mod **jar file** into your Minecraft **`mods` folder**.
2.  Start your game

***

## 📦 Modpack and Editing Use

*   **Modpacks:** This mod is explicitly permitted for use in **any public or private modpack**. No need to ask for permission to edit or include it!
